# Reduced real fixtures for Level 0 comparison

These fixtures support the Phase 10.14B structural Level 0 comparison tests.
They are small, versioned excerpts from existing project artifacts. They are
not numerical baselines and must not be used as physical validation.

## Files

| File | Origin | Extraction date | Cut criterion | Size limit |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `legacy_buz67d_sample.dat` | `legance/LOT_Tese/results/8-BUZ-67D-PKN.dat` | 2026-06-07 | Header, time vector, first `Layer 1` / `dP` block and its three rows | 50 KB |
| `legacy_score_mro28_sample.json` | `legance/LOT_APB_v5/SCORE-MRO-28_output.json` | 2026-06-07 | One representative time block for annulus `0`, reduced to two `md` samples | 50 KB |
| `modern_buz67d_sample.csv` | `results/phase10_14b_buz67d/timeseries.csv` generated by `lot-sim` | 2026-06-07 | Header plus first 15 rows | 50 KB |

## Modern generation command

```powershell
.\build\Debug\lot-sim.exe run --case cases\lot_tese_migrated\buz67d_pkn.yaml --mode lot-pkn --output results\phase10_14b_buz67d
```

## Caveats

- The fixtures are for structural Level 0 comparison only.
- There is no physical validation in this phase.
- Legacy time units are not normalized.
- Legacy `Layer` is 1-based and is not equivalent to modern `wall_gp_*`.
- Legacy outputs do not export `sigmaTheta`, `pw`, `margin`, or `opened`.
- No fracture opening, damage, tensor stress, rupture, or quantitative pressure correlation is validated here.
